title: Ensure that the endpoint protection for all Virtual Machines is  installed

input_row.title: Ensure that the endpoint protection for all Virtual Machines is  installed
input_row.description: Install endpoint protection for all virtual machines.
input_row.rationale: Installing endpoint protection systems (like Security Center for Alibaba Cloud) provides for real-time protection capability that helps identify and remove viruses, spyware, and other malicious software, with configurable alerts when known malicious software attempts to install itself or run on ECS.
input_row.audit: Through the Alibaba Cloud Management Console: 1. Logon to Security Center Console 2. Select Overview 3. Ensure all ECS are installed with Security Center agent
input_row.remediation: Through the Alibaba Cloud Management Console: 1. Logon to Security Center Console 2. Select Settings 3. Click Agent 4. On the Agent tab, select the virtual machines without Security Center agent installed 5. Click Install
input_row.default_value: Not installed 123 | P a g e

step1_initial_assessment:
**AUDIT APPROACH:** Manual

**MANUAL STEPS:**
1. **Step:** Log in to the Alibaba Cloud Management Console and navigate to the Security Center Console.
   - **Path:** Security Center → Overview
2. **What to verify/validate:** Check the list of Elastic Compute Service (ECS) instances displayed to ensure that all virtual machines have the Security Center agent installed.
3. **Expected secure configuration:** Every ECS instance should have the Security Center agent installed.
4. **How to confirm compliance:** Confirm compliance by ensuring that no ECS instances are listed as having "no agent installed". If any instances do not have the agent installed, it indicates non-compliance.
